languages.original_text: "This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

languages.text: "Новые владения чем-то напоминают мне родной мир, этфаттер. Помни мои слова: люди, что вышли с него, станут твоими вернейшими союзниками и страшнейшими врагами всему, что встанет супротив Человечества".

"This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."
languages.original_text: "Новые владения чем-то напоминают мне родной мир, этфаттер. Помни мои слова: люди, что вышли с него, станут твоими вернейшими союзниками и страшнейшими врагами всему, что встанет супротив Человечества".

traits.locale_text: "This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

"This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

"This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

languages.text: 「この新しい領土は、私の故郷であるアエット・ヴァターを思い出させる。私の言葉に耳を傾けよ。この地から来た人たちは、人類の最も忠実な同盟者となり、人類に敵対するすべての人類の敵となるだろう」
languages.original_text: "This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

traits.locale_text: 「この新しい領土は、私の故郷であるアエット・ヴァターを思い出させる。私の言葉に耳を傾けよ。この地から来た人たちは、人類の最も忠実な同盟者となり、人類に敵対するすべての人類の敵となるだろう。」

languages.text: « Ce nouveau domaine me rappelle mon monde d'origine, aett-vater. Croyez-moi, les habitants de cette planète deviendront vos plus fervents alliés et les combattants les plus redoutables face à tous les ennemis de l'humanité. »
languages.original_text: "This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

traits.locale_text: « Ce nouveau domaine me rappelle mon monde d'origine, aett-vater. Croyez-moi, les habitants de cette planète deviendront vos plus fervents alliés et les combattants les plus redoutables face à tous les ennemis de l'humanité. »

languages.text: "Dieses neue Reich erinnert mich an meine Heimatwelt, Aett-Vater. Denkt an meine Worte: Die Leute, die von hier kommen, werden Eure standhaftesten Verbündeten sein und allen Feinden der Menschheit entschlossen die Stirn bieten."
languages.original_text: "This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Dieses neue Reich erinnert mich an meine Heimatwelt, Aett-Vater. Denkt an meine Worte: Die Leute, die von hier kommen, werden Eure standhaftesten Verbündeten sein und allen Feinden der Menschheit entschlossen die Stirn bieten."

languages.text: "Bu yeni mülk bana ana dünyamı hatırlatıyor Aett-Vater. Sözümü yaz bir kenara: Buradan gelen insanlar, en sadık müttefiklerin ve İnsanlığın karşısında duran her şeyin en azılı düşmanları olacak."
languages.original_text: "This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Bu yeni mülk bana ana dünyamı hatırlatıyor Aett-Vater. Sözümü yaz bir kenara: Buradan gelen insanlar, en sadık müttefiklerin ve İnsanlığın karşısında duran her şeyin en azılı düşmanları olacak."

languages.text: «Este nuevo dominio me recuerda a mi mundo natal, Aett-Vater. Recuerda bien mis palabras: los habitantes de este lugar serán tus aliados más acérrimos y se opondrán con furia a los enemigos de la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

traits.locale_text: «Este nuevo dominio me recuerda a mi mundo natal, Aett-Vater. Recuerda bien mis palabras: los habitantes de este lugar serán tus aliados más acérrimos y se opondrán con furia a los enemigos de la Humanidad».

languages.text: “狼领，这片新领地让我想起了家乡。记住我的话：从这里走出来的人，将成为你最坚定的盟友，也是任何人类之敌最强大的死敌。”
languages.original_text: "This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."

traits.locale_text: “狼领，这片新领地让我想起了家乡。记住我的话：从这里走出来的人，将成为你最坚定的盟友，也是任何人类之敌最强大的死敌。”
